gaplightr 0.0.0.9000

    • Introduction to gaplightr
    • Analysing a Real Fisheye Photo

Compute solar positions and radiation values

Source: R/photo.R
gla_compute_solar_positions.Rd

Compute solar positions and radiation values

Usage

gla_compute_solar_positions(
  lat_deg,
  long_deg,
  elev,
  clearsky_coef,
  time_step_min,
  day_start,
  day_end,
  day_res,
  elev_res,
  azi_res,
  solar_constant
)
